channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title:
RT @_lewtun: The @huggingface ML Intern is trending #1 across 1.2M Spaces on the Hub 🔥
What part of...
item.description:
RT @_lewtun: The @huggingface ML Intern is trending #1 across 1.2M Spaces on the Hub 🔥
What part of my job should we automate next?
Link…
--- @_akhaliq | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 4 | 💬 0 | 👁 0
item.author: @_akhaliq

item.title: 每次我有视频类的内容（譬如采访或分享）我都避免去看视频本身和底下的评论。因为不看都知道无非就是几类内容：胖了丑了秃了，哗众取宠，幸存者效应。我不是说不尊重大家评论的自由，但是为什么中文互联网的视频内容...
item.author: @turingou

item.title: 一个月之前我写了个脚本让 cc 天天抢东京意大利签证预约日期，修复了至少七八次在流程上的问题（有空位但是没有抢成功）到后来我都烦了，想着算了吧，我直接改个国家申请，让 cc 写了封邮件我发送到希腊使馆...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
This is great - @deepseek_ai V4 supports prefill! :D
Most other providers have been dropping suppor...
item.description:
This is great - @deepseek_ai V4 supports prefill! :D
Most other providers have been dropping support for this critically important capability, so wonderful to see at least one company stepping up. https://t.co/kFbtBsgcIq
--- @jeremyphoward | ❤️ 16 | 🔁 1 | 💬 4 | 👁 983
